fields.Name: Qwen 3.7 Max
fields.Description: Alibaba Cloud's flagship Qwen 3.7 series 'Deep Thinking' (reasoning) model, made available via Alibaba Cloud Model Studio (snapshot qwen3.7-max-2026-05-20) and announced at the 2026 Alibaba Cloud Summit. Designed for the agent-centric era with strong programming, office and productivity, and long-horizon autonomous execution capabilities. Features a 1M token context window (991K max input standard / 983K in Thinking Mode), 64K max output, text-only input/output, native function calling, prefix continuation, web search, and explicit prompt caching. Structured Output, Batches, and Fine-tuning are not supported. Scores 57 on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index (#7 overall).

fields.Name: Grok Build 0.1
fields.Description: xAI's first purpose-built coding model, released in early access on May 14, 2026. Trained specifically for agentic software-engineering workflows: multi-step tool use, terminal interaction, error-checking, and self-correction loops. Built-in reasoning is always active. Accepts text and image inputs; emits text. Supports function calling and structured outputs. 256K token context window with no enforced output cap, enabling whole-codebase refactors without the typical 8K output ceiling. Input cost doubles for context above 200K tokens. Available via xAI direct API and via OpenRouter passthrough. SuperGrok and X Premium subscribers can use Grok Build through xAI's OpenCode environment with no separate API billing.
